violations.text: The food contact surface of the (tomato chopper) was observed with food debris. PIC relocated tomato chopper to dishwasher to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

A food prep sink in the main kitchen area is lacking a proper air gap (observed with an air break). A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Red sauce and in-house made garlic butter was observed cooling on a counter tightly wrapped in plastic. PIC placed items in blast chiller at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking appropriate labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC removed items from where consumers could grab items themselves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli slicer have an accumulation of food debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

A food prep sink in the main kitchen area is lacking a proper air gap (observed with an air break). A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024
The walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
